models.title: White Ceramic Towel Bar Set
source_fields:
This 24 x 4in. White Ceramic Towel Bar Set in white will add a uniformed look to any bathroom.

Our varied selection of bathroom accessories is sure to offer just the right finishing pieces for your bath or shower project. We offer corner shelves, towel bars, soap dishes and more in a variety of materials, colors, and finishes.

models.title: Grant Chrome 18 in. Towel Bar
source_fields:
Grant Chrome 18 in. Towel Bar by Studio Design Collection is the perfect addition to any bathroom, offering both style and functionality. Designed for residential and commercial use, this towel bar combines elegance with durability to meet your everyday needs.

  • The polished, high gloss finish enhances the overall aesthetic appeal of your bathroom.
  • Chrome complements various bathroom dcors, adding a touch of sophistication.
  • Suitable for wall installation, ensuring a secure and stable placement.
  • Warranty provides peace of mind with lifetime limited coverage for long-term reliability.
  • Ideal for residential and commercial usage, making it versatile for different settings.

Upgrade your bathroom with the Grant Chrome 18 in. Towel Bar, combining style, durability, and functionality. Perfect for any modern space.

models.title: Parker Brushed Nickel 18 in. Towel Bar

  • Designed by the renowned Studio Design Collection, guaranteeing high-quality craftsmanship and aesthetic appeal.
  • Comes with a lifetime limited warranty, offering peace of mind and long-term reliability.

Upgrade your bathroom with the Parker Brushed Nickel 18 in. Towel Bar, combining style, functionality, and durability for an exceptional addition to your space.
